docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,964.38 FILED BY PICCININI, VICO AS TO DEFENDANT BORIANA LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY PICCININI, VICO
NOTICE OF ACTION TAKEN (FROM SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEAANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF PICCININI, VICO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED OCT-30-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BORIANA LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PICCININI, VICO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BORIANA LLC $1,964.38 PRINCIPAL, $82.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,046.88, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PICCININI, VICO AS TO DEFENDANT BORIANA LLC
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BORIANA LLC HEARING SET FOR MAR-18-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO STAY WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED ON FEB. 5, 2010 TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, FILED. COPY SENT TO THE SHERIFF'S DEPT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED; CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE, AS TO ENTIRE ACTION. THE WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED ON FEB-05-2010 IS VACATED, ADN THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY FUNDS SUBJECT TO LEVY TO PLAINTIFF PICCININI. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM103)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY BORIANA LLC IS GRANTED. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $465.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BORIANA LLC
ORDER TO STAY WRIT SUBMITTED TO COURT.
